methodology_options.slr: Systematic Literature Review (Kitchenham) — survey académique rigoureux
methodology_options.sms: Systematic Mapping Study (Petersen) — cartographie d'un champ
methodology_options.mlr: Multivocal Literature Review (Garousi) — inclut grey literature
methodology_options.sok: Systematization of Knowledge — publication sécurité (S&P, USENIX)
methodology_options.narrative: Revue narrative — état de l'art informel
